uplink.description: Periodic uplink (fPort 4): box temperature + humidity -> climate
uplink._note: Upstream-example input (TTN strega smart-valve codec yaml, Apache-2.0). expected.data via the ported upstream decoder (oracle: Temp 23.96 C, Hygro 46.82 %). Temp->air.temperature, Hygro->air.relativeHumidity (climate); Bat->batteryPercent; Power->powerState and valve/leak/fraud/DI status as camelCase extras.
